title: ferray-linalg: no svdvals (singular values only, without U/Vt)
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy 2.0 added np.linalg.svdvals(x) which returns only the singular values without computing U or Vt — significantly faster for large matrices when you only need the singular values (e.g., for matrix_rank, cond, norm). ferray-linalg always computes full SVD via svd(a, full_matrices). The norms module calls svd() internally for nuclear norm, spectral norm, and matrix_rank, computing unnecessary U/Vt. Add svdvals() using faer's singular_values() or thin_svd with a flag to skip eigenvector computation.
